properties.name: Eastern Interconnection
properties.description: Approximate WGS84 GeoJSON polygon for the Eastern Interconnection. The internal electrical boundary is hand-generalized from public descriptions; coastlines are clipped to Basemap/GSHHS land polygons. Approximates central Canada to the Atlantic coast excluding Quebec, south to Florida, and west to the Great Plains excluding most of Texas. Designed for grid2poster/cartographic rendering, not for operational, regulatory, or reliability-boundary analysis.
source_basis: Public descriptions of the Eastern Interconnection footprint
Basemap packaged GSHHS coastline/land polygons for coastline clipping
processing: Intersected with packaged GSHHS land polygons in WGS84 lon-lat
Removed very small fragments and simplified with 0.03 degree tolerance
